query: I was about to head into the living room and was wondering how the air quality is in there right now

steps.thought: The user wants to know the air quality in the living room. I can use get_room_states to get environmental states, which includes PM10 as an indicator of air quality. First, I need to verify the room exists. I'll get the list of rooms.
The living room exists. I will now get its environmental states to check air quality (PM10).
The living room's PM10 level is 99.75 μg/m³, which indicates good air quality (under 100 μg/m³). I will inform the user with this info.

action_input.answer: The air quality in the living room is good, with a PM10 level of 99.75 μg/m³. Enjoy your time there!
